name: ◦ Maid Game ◦
description:
This is a masturbation game idea for ladies to instruct them through self-pleasure while completing chores. Enjoy all the thankless chores and make them more pleasurable to do.

This game is inspired by maid cleaning games found online. I take no credit for this game or idea.

◦ This is a bot/idea that's still in testing. Feedback and requests are always appreciated. ◦

Feel free to help it learn faster by editing and rating responses. Enjoy!
